title: The Energy Price Shock
subtitle: Heat, light, and the price of keeping both.

turns.prompt: Gas and electricity prices triple overnight. Families choose between heating and eating. Industry warns of shutdowns.

choices.label: Subsidise household energy bills
choices.reaction: Meters spin slower for households. The finance ministry sweats.

choices.label: Crash-build wind and solar capacity
choices.flavour: Build your way out of import dependence.
choices.reaction: Turbines go up on hillsides. Today's bills stay painfully high.

choices.label: Fast-track domestic fossil fuel extraction
choices.reaction: Fuel flows sooner than expected. Climate campaigners mobilise.

turns.prompt: Short-term relief measures land. Winter approaches. Storage levels look thin.

choices.label: Cap energy prices for households
choices.reaction: Bills flatten on statements. Suppliers warn of losses.

choices.label: Fund home insulation and efficiency
choices.flavour: Fix the leak, not just the bill.
choices.reaction: Tradespeople get busy. Results take months to feel.

choices.label: Bail out energy-intensive industry
choices.flavour: Save jobs on the factory floor.
choices.reaction: Factories stay lit. Small businesses ask why they were skipped.

turns.prompt: A cold snap hits. Grid operators warn of rolling blackouts. Protesters gather outside power companies.

choices.label: Introduce temporary energy rationing
choices.flavour: Fair shares of a scarce supply.
choices.reaction: Blackouts become scheduled. Complaints flood hotlines.

choices.label: Pay premium for emergency imports
choices.reaction: Lights stay on. Sovereignty feels negotiable.

choices.label: Windfall tax on energy producers
choices.flavour: Take from those who profited from pain.
choices.reaction: Treasury coffers swell. Investment in new supply slows.

turns.prompt: The crisis exposes every shortcut. There is no cheap way through a cold, dark winter.

memory_callbacks.text: The drilling you rushed online cannot fill the gap this winter.
Subsidies you promised now collide with empty reserves.
Renewables you rushed online cannot heat homes this winter.

choices.label: Nationalise the grid operator
choices.reaction: State engineers run the switches. Private capital retreats.

choices.label: Cut other budgets to keep the lights on
choices.reaction: Schools and clinics feel the squeeze. Homes stay warm.

choices.label: Beg neighbouring countries for shared supply
choices.reaction: Power flows across borders. Pride takes a hit.

turns.prompt: Final reckoning. What energy system did you leave behind?

choices.label: Commit to a renewable future regardless of cost
choices.reaction: Clean power ramps up. Today's bills remain a memory.

choices.label: Prioritise cheap energy above all else
choices.reaction: Factories hum. Climate targets slip quietly.

choices.label: Build full domestic energy independence
choices.reaction: Import bills shrink. The build-out takes years — and patience runs out first.
